title: Veritas Press
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Veritas Press''' was a localized printing business in [[Column Commons]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The company was still in business during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but the business showed signs of age and lack of interest, and as a result was not very profitable.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
